What We Do

Visual
Transformation

Every brand deserves a digital presence that reflects its true value.

We study what's working, and what isn't — then rebuild with intention.

These before-and-after cases illustrate the impact of coherent brand strategy applied to digital environments. We don't just redesign pages — we reposition entire brand experiences.

From cluttered e-commerce storefronts to polished luxury presentations, from outdated service pages to refined editorial systems — the transformation is always rooted in clarity, restraint, and typographic authority.

Each project begins with a question: what impression should this brand leave? Everything else follows.

Selected Works

Case
Studies

06
01
E-Commerce

ShopZone
→ Luxora

E-Commerce Luxury Retail UX Strategy

A dated multi-category storefront rebuilt as a premium lifestyle destination. The redesign replaced competing visual noise with a cohesive warm palette, editorial imagery, and a trust-first hierarchy — transforming transaction-focused browsing into an aspirational shopping experience.

02
Salon & Beauty

Hair Passion
→ Atelier Lumière

Salon Editorial Brand Repositioning

A Flash-era salon site transformed into a Parisian atelier aesthetic. By stripping away decorative excess and centering black-and-white editorial photography with elegant serif typography, the brand was elevated from local salon to high-end destination.

03
Medical Aesthetics

ABC Aesthetics
→ Lumière Aesthetics

Medical Wellness Trust Design

A cluttered clinic site overloaded with promotions and competing CTAs rebuilt around calm authority. The redesigned experience communicates physician-led expertise through restrained typography, warm earth tones, and a clear narrative sequence that earns patient trust before it asks for action.

04
Food & Artisan

Sweet Dreams
→ Willow & Crumb

Artisan Food Craft Branding Lifestyle

From candy-pink cartoon aesthetic to warm artisan storytelling. The redesign repositioned a local bakery as a craft destination — using moody food photography, a muted earthy palette, and handwritten accent type to create the feeling of something made with care, for people who notice.

05
Fine Jewellery

Handmade Jewelry
→ Atelier Lumine

Luxury Goods Dark Aesthetic Premium E-Commerce

A flat-lit product catalogue elevated into a collector's experience. The new identity deploys a black canvas, gold typographic accents, and dramatic close-up photography to communicate rarity and craft — repositioning handmade pieces from affordable gifts to heirloom investments.

06
EdTech Platform

E-Learning
→ LearnAura

EdTech Dashboard Product Design

A utilitarian dashboard redesigned as a motivating learning environment. The transformation introduced dark mode depth, category colour-coding, clear progress visualization, and a reward-oriented hierarchy — turning obligation into habit by making progress feel visible and meaningful.
